title: Custom properties (CSS vars)
description: Design tokens, cascading, and dynamic theming.

questions.prompt: Syntax to declare a custom property:
questions.explanation: Two dashes prefix. Then use with var(--brand).
Second arg is the fallback if --brand is undefined.
Custom props cascade — the closer definition on .card overrides :root.

questions.prompt: Can you change custom properties at runtime?
questions.explanation: Fully dynamic — perfect for themes, sliders, and effects.

questions.prompt: Best place to declare app-wide design tokens:
questions.explanation: :root has slightly higher specificity than html and is idiomatic for tokens.

options: CSS vars exist at runtime and cascade; Sass vars are compiled away
questions.explanation: Real cascading, real dynamism — that's the whole point.
